data.title: Trump's upset over Fed renovations, set to visit construction site with officials amid allegations of mismanagement.
data.description: On Thursday, President Trump will be visiting the construction site of the central bank along with administration officials. The visit comes in light of allegations that the project, which has incurred significant costs, has been poorly handled.
Brazilian President Lula States "Trump Does Not Want To Talk To Me, Otherwise He Would Call Me"

data.title: CNCF survey shows 60% of Kubernetes clusters use Argo CD, praised for 3.0 performance & security.
data.description: A recent survey found that approximately 60% of Kubernetes clusters under the management of respondents are currently dependent on Argo CD. This notable preference is attributed to the high satisfaction levels stemming from the 3.0 version's improved performance and security enhancements. This information was disclosed in San Francisco on July 24, 2025, by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), an organization dedicated to establishing lasting ecosystems in the technology sector.
Brazil's Lula Announces Regulation for Big Tech Companies In Brazil

data.title: SES and Luxembourg Govt to launch GovSat-2 satellite for secure communication, with GovSat-1 to provide reliable services.
data.description: Luxembourg-based SES and the Luxembourg Government have unveiled their collaboration to launch a second satellite for GovSat, a joint venture between the two entities, offering secure satellite communication services for governments. The new satellite, GovSat-2, will be positioned over the European satellite arc, complementing the existing GovSat-1. This venture, set as a 50/50 partnership, aims to enhance connectivity services for government clients.

data.title: Sui Blockchain now offers full beta gRPC support, improving data access and real-time streaming, transitioning from JSON-RPC.
data.description: The Sui Blockchain platform has rolled out extensive beta support for gRPC, significantly boosting data access and real-time streaming capabilities. This transition from JSON-RPC to gRPC signifies a move towards a more efficient and scalable API. This update is expected to accelerate performance on the platform, catering to the needs of users seeking enhanced speed and responsiveness in their interactions.
BRAZIL'S LULA: I ASK THE U.S. GOVERNMENT TO RESPECT THE BRAZILIAN PEOPLE, JUST LIKE I RESPECT THE U.S.

data.title: Amtrak's Pacific Surfliner will pause train service north of Goleta for bridge replacement project. Lossan Rail Corridor Agency oversees the service.
data.description: Orange, California, July 24, 2025 – A project aimed at replacing a bridge is set to improve safety and operations. The Los Angeles – San Diego – San Luis Obispo Rail Corridor Agency, overseeing Amtrak® Pacific Surfliner® service, disclosed today that the initiative will benefit train services heading north.

data.title: New Toll Brothers model home opens in Dripping Springs, TX, offering luxury single-family homes with resort-style amenities at Headwaters.
data.description: Toll Brothers presents upscale single-family residences with access to upscale amenities in the popular Headwaters community. Luxury homes and resort-style facilities are available.

data.title: Cielo gets ISO 42001 certification using FairNow's AI platform, easing pre-audit process. Key info: Cielo, ISO 42001, FairNow, Washington, July 24, 2025.
data.description: FairNow was specifically designed to manage AI on the application front, aiding in streamlining Cielo's pre-audit procedure by consolidating risks, controls, and documentation within a unified system. On July 24, 2025, Washington-based Cielo, a major Talent Acquisition Partner globally, disclosed that with the assistance of FairNow, they were able to enhance their operational efficiency.

data.title: 14700 TP, LLC buys Ten Pines at Summerwood, a Houston residential community, for $31.2 million.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, 14700 TP, LLC revealed their purchase of Ten Pines at Summerwood, a high-end residential community in Houston, TX, for $31.2 million. Situated at 14700 Woodson Park Drive, the acquisition was finalized on April 28, 2025.
U.S. State Department Cannot Disclose Details About Licenses To PDVSA Partners But States That Venezuela's Maduro Regime Will Not Benefit From Oil Sales

data.title: Blackstone breaks industry record with $1.2 trillion in assets, sees 22% increase in revenues, $3.075 billion in Q2.
data.description: Shares of Blackstone (NYSE: BX) saw a significant increase in value on Thursday following the announcement of a strong second quarter performance. The alternative asset manager exceeded analyst expectations with a 22% year-over-year surge in segment revenues. This growth was primarily driven by a remarkable 25% rise in distributable earnings, leading to a total assets under management reaching a new industry peak of over $1.2 trillion. Blackstone's second-quarter fiscal year segment revenues were reported at $3.075 billion, marking a 22% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing analyst projections of $2.778 billion. The distributable earnings also showed a notable 25% year-over-year growth.
Valeo CEO Announces Around EUR 1 Billion Sales Guidance Cut, with EUR 250 Million Due to Decreased Customer Market Demand

data.title: Agora Restaurant Group to open third location in Bethesda, Maryland in spring 2026. Exciting expansion news!
data.description: A renowned Mediterranean restaurant group known as Agora Restaurant Group has confirmed the launch of its third location, Agora Bethesda, in Spring 2026 at One Bethesda in Maryland. This restaurant group is famous for its Mediterranean dining establishments in Washington, D.C., and Tysons, Virginia. The opening is anticipated to take place a year from now, in line with the group's expansion plans.

data.title: Americase to discuss battery regulations at 2025 OCP APAC Summit in Texas. Focus on alternatives to lithium-ion batteries.
data.description: A committee will investigate the obstacles in regulations and potential substitutes for lithium-ion batteries in future data centers in WAXAHACHIE, Texas, as of July 24, 2025. Americase, a prominent provider of protective containers for dangerous substances and valuable items, is set to join the discussion.

data.title: Hilco Streambank is auctioning off a 20% stake in BKFC, bids due Aug 22, 2025, auction on Aug 25, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, bids are scheduled to be submitted for a public auction set to take place on August 25, 2025, in New York. Hilco Streambank is offering the chance to obtain around 20% unadulterated stake in Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship (BKFC), a rapidly expanding and pioneering sports media organization.
LVMH CFO: Price Hikes Need To Come With Improvement In Product

data.title: Vine meme coin surges as Elon Musk announces return of Vine with AI twist. Crypto bros drive up value.
data.description: The previously popular video platform Vine is making a comeback with a new artificial intelligence twist, as announced by Elon Musk on Thursday. Following this news, enthusiasts in the cryptocurrency community, known as "crypto bros," are actively promoting the Vine meme coin, generating significant traction in the market.

data.title: Perspective Therapeutics to present updated data on [ 212 Pb]VMT-α-NET program at ESMO Congress 2025 in Berlin on October 17-21.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. ("Perspective" or "the Company") disclosed that the updated data regarding the Company's [212 Pb]VMT-α-NET program have been approved for presentation at the European Society of Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress 2025 in Berlin, Germany from October 17 to 21, 2025. Further information on regular abstracts will be revealed by ESMO on October 13, 2025. Perspective is a radiopharmaceutical company specializing in innovative cancer treatments and is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol CATX.
